TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_pincwayan, title = pincwayan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/pincwayan} }

S.FORM: pincwi'an дҫӢеҸҘ:Rimuy, ita sazing hya ga, kahul squ yaba ta pincwayan ta ./ дҫӢеҸҘ:Sabi, simu ki Tapas hya ga,kahul squ yaba mamu ki mamu qu pincwi'an mamu вҶ’ж’’зў§, ./ дҫӢеҸҘ:simu mtsway qani ga, kahul squ lkkwatas mamuw qu qpincwi'an mamu hya ./

pincwi'an дҫӢеҸҘ:Rimuy, ita sazing hya ga, kahul squ yaba ta pincwayan ta ./ дҫӢеҸҘ:Sabi, simu ki Tapas hya ga,kahul squ yaba mamu ki mamu qu pincwi'an mamu вҶ’ж’’зў§, ./ дҫӢеҸҘ:simu mtsway qani ga, kahul squ lkkwatas mamuw qu qpincwi'an mamu hya ./
S.PHON: pinКҰ~КЁwiК”an **:rimuj, ita s~Й•aziЕӢ Д§ja ЙЈa, kaД§ul s~Й•qu jaОІa ta pinКҰ~КЁwajan ta ./ **:s~Й•aОІi, s~Й•imu ki tapas~Й• Д§ja ЙЈa,kaД§ul s~Й•qu jaОІa mamu ki mamu qu pinКҰ~КЁwiК”an mamu ***, ./ **:s~Й•imu mts~Й•waj qani ЙЈa, kaД§ul s~Й•qu lkkwatas~Й• mamuw qu qpinКҰ~КЁwiК”an mamu Д§ja ./
